title: On Independence Day, Israel Honors Rabbi Who Called to ‘Flatten’ Gaza
summary_full: Avraham Zarbiv became known on Israel’s right for demolishing buildings in Gaza. He lit a torch at a national ceremony on Tuesday evening.
summary_public: Avraham Zarbiv became known on Israel’s right for demolishing buildings in Gaza. He lit a torch at a national ceremony on Tuesday evening.
